standing_authorization: BATCH-37-SPECIFIC, operator AskUserQuestion 2026-07-11 at kickoff (re-asked after plan crafted, per operator request): RUN MODE = 'Autonomous + I self-merge'. AUTONOMY GRANTED: the agent runs ALL phase gates + increment gates autonomously (presenting full review packets in-conversation at each, self-approving with a named exit-criteria axis check), NO stop-for-approval at gates. MERGE AUTHORITY GRANTED (self-merge): after PR opened + CI green, a FINAL independent PR-level qa-reviewer pass over the WHOLE merged diff vs main (dual traceability intact, 0 engine-frozen diffs, no cross-increment regression, every gate carry discharged) MUST come back clean; only then may the agent merge, then proceed to /dev-flow-sync. A HIGH finding BLOCKS the merge and returns to the operator. GUARDRAILS: full suite + engine-frozen guards + independent code-review GREEN before PR; snapshot regen canonical-CI-only (LOCAL REGEN FORBIDDEN); propose-not-encode new dev-flow controls (AskUserQuestion before encoding); every autonomous decision recorded in PLAN.md + this decisions_log + 05-postmortem + carried to vault at sync. PER-BATCH RULE (feedback_standing_auth_per_batch): batch-37-only; NEVER carried to batch-38; re-ask at next kickoff. Return to operator on: a HIGH final-QA finding, a genuine operator-only decision, or completion.
